concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive criticism about advisor Xiaobin Xiong including claims about misleading lab naming, conference quality judgments, and negative impacts on PhD students
concerns.excerpt:
UW-Madison Xiaobin Xiong
回国了，在上海创智
自己从来没做过ai为了蹭管自己的lab叫legged AI lab
曾言CoRL是水会不许投
回国导致自己phd居无定所
